title: Cobblemon Planet
description: A modpack centered around the Cobblemon mod with quality-of-life enhancements and performance optimizations.
body:
# Welcome to Cobblemon Planet!
Cobblemon Planet is a modpack built for Cobblemon players who want a smooth, optimized experience without the hassle of setting everything up themselves. This carefully selected collection of mods improves performance, boosts FPS, and adds quality-of-life features — making your Cobblemon journey more immersive and enjoyable than ever!

## 📢 Important Info 📢
- 💾 It is recommended to allocate atleast **4GB** of RAM for a smooth gameplay experience

## 📜 Mods List 📜

<details>
<summary>⚙️ Core Mods</summary>

- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)

</details>

<details>
<summary>🚀 Optimization</summary>

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)

</details>

<details>
<summary>✨ Quality of Life</summary>

- [Apple Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Better F1 Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f1-reborn)
- [BoccHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/bocchud)
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [E4MC](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
- [Just Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-zoom)
- [Lamb Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)
- [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular)
- [Visuality: Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality-forge)
- [Wakes: Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes-reforged)
</details>
